title: CustomItems
description: A plugin adding some custom items (and a small surprise)
body:
# Itscoldhere's custom items plugin
## A plugin for some custom items just for some fun
This plugin adds new items with interesting mechanics into the game (All of them have a special ability which can be activated by right clicking)
# Installation Guide:
- Close the PaperMC server if it is open
- Download the wanted version from the [Releases](https://modrinth.com/plugin/customitems/versions) page
- Open the "plugins" folder in your PaperMC server
- Move the .jar file into the folder

# Usage Guide:
- The Plugin has a lot of commands, do /help [command_name] to see it's use
- To find the command names type "/customitems:" into the chat and look at the results
- Every item has a description of the item and so I won't explain it here

# Special Commands
- /annoying - An annoying command on the people it is used on (it is the surprise, you'll have to use it and see)
- /enablesnowball - Enables/Disables getting snowball launcher on damage
- /heal - Heals the player and sets their saturation to 20

# A bit of item info:
- AOTE - some may recognize this as the Aspect Of The End from hypixel skyblock and you would be correct, just that it is now a wand and not a sword, basically a teleporting wand
- Snowball launcher - Does exactly what it says it does but focuses on annoying players rather then damage (also had knockback 30)
